channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Please inspect the paving at 30 Beadon, 7th May
item.description:
Paving is cracked and a trip hazard - can this be inspected?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Beadon Road, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Animal carcass, 7th May
item.description:
The carcass of a fox has been left double-bagged in a bin for retrieval

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wordsworth Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tags on Hoardings, 7th May
item.description:
Tags on Hoardings Location: 51.454988021716986, -0.11897417421362162
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Josephine Avenue, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost light not working, 7th May
item.description:
Lamppost light has been not been working for over 3 weeks, it’s been reported once and still has not been fixed despite a notification to say a contractor had been sent. The road is incredibly dark at night making access dangerous when on foot.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Whitehaven Close, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of rubbish dumped on pavement, 6th May
item.description:
Bag of rubbish dumped on pavement outside our bin cupboard. Not related to flats.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Warwick Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fix pole 17, 6th May
item.description:
Pole 17 needs fixing! After EV charge point was installed it’s off at night an CARS PARKED UNDERNEATH IT ARE BROKEN INTO EVERY NIGHT. FIX IT ONCE AND FOR ALL

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Orange box dumped on Becket street, 6th May
item.description:
There is a orange box containing plastic bottles and other household items dumped on Becket street. It was reported two days ago, despite fixmystreet saying it has been removed. The box is still on the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Becket Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various Items of Rubbish and Broken Furniture Dumped on Path, 6th May
item.description:
Various items of rubbish and broken furniture have been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burrage Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Garden Shrub Dumped on Turfed Area, 6th May
item.description:
An unwanted garden shrub has been left dumped on the turfed area. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arthur Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large Amount of Rubbish Dumped on Path, 6th May
item.description:
A large amount of rubbish has been left dumped on the path. Can the local team please clear it away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Arthur Grove, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Timber and Furniture Dumped in Raised Planter, 6th May
item.description:
Unwanted timber and furniture has been left dumped in the raised planter. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maxey Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken and Rusty Garden Furniture Dumped on Path, 6th May
item.description:
Several items of broken and rusty garden furniture have been left dumped on the path by the turfed space. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Villas Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
